description: Your trap gains a secondary enhanced effect based on its type (Electrified Caltrops, Reactive Flames, Scatter Bomb, or Shared Pain).
tooltipTemplate: Gains a trap-specific enhanced effect. Own a Bronze trap perk to see the specific bonus.

tooltipTemplateByTrap.caltrops: Electrified Caltrops: each tick deals +{electrifiedBonusDamagePerTick} bonus damage with a {electrifiedStunChance%} chance to stun for {electrifiedStunDuration:2}s and deal {electrifiedStunDamage} electric damage on stun (cooldown {electrifiedStunCooldownSeconds:1}s).
tooltipTemplateByTrap.fire_pit: Reactive Flames: expels a reactive burst ({reactiveFlamesRadius} radius, {reactiveFlamesDamage} damage) when triggered.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.explosive_trap: Scatter Bomb: spawns {scatterBombCount} child bombs within {scatterBombSpawnRadius} radius lasting {scatterBombChildDurationSeconds:1}s.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.marker_trap: Shared Pain: {sharedPainFraction%} of damage dealt to the marked enemy is also dealt to other marked enemies.

description: Each trap placement deploys additional traps at a short offset from the original.
tooltipTemplate: Each placement also deploys {bonusTrapCount} additional traps offset by {bonusOffsetDistance} units.

description: Your traps gain a powerful final effect (Spike Surge, Flame Collapse, Cataclysm Blast, or Final Exposure).
tooltipTemplate: Traps gain a powerful final effect on expiry. Own a Bronze trap perk to see the specific payoff.

tooltipTemplateByTrap.caltrops: Spike Surge: on expiry, bursts for {spikeSurgeBurstDamage} damage and slows to {spikeSurgeSlowMultiplier%} of base speed for {spikeSurgeSlowDurationSeconds:1}s.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.fire_pit: Flame Collapse: on expiry, collapses ({flameCollapseRadiusMultiplier+%} radius) for {flameCollapseDamage} damage and {flameCollapseBurnDamagePerSecond:1} burn DPS for {flameCollapseBurnDurationSeconds:1}s.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.explosive_trap: Cataclysm: each detonation triggers a secondary explosion at {cataclysmRadiusMultiplier+%} radius after {cataclysmSecondaryDelaySeconds:1}s — pairs with Aftershock for 4 total blasts.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.marker_trap: Final Exposure: when a marked enemy leaves the zone, deal {finalExposureBurstDamage} damage to them and to every other enemy still carrying a mark from the same trap.
